# Pull Request

## Description
<!-- Provide a clear description of what this PR does -->

## Type of Change
<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style/UI update (changes that don't affect functionality)
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ✅ Test update

## Related Issue
<!-- Link to the issue this PR addresses -->
Fixes #(issue number)

<!-- List the specific changes made in this PR -->
- Change 1
- Change 2
- Change 3

## Screenshots
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots to demonstrate changes -->

## Testing
<!-- Describe how you tested these changes -->
- [ ] Tested on desktop browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)
- [ ] Tested on mobile devices
- [ ] Tested in dark mode and light mode
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] Backend tests pass (`pytest backend/tests -v`)
- [ ] Frontend builds successfully (`npm run build`)

## Checklist
<!-- Mark items as complete with [x] -->
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published
